description.content: Routes for auth

Controller: signUp
Schema: signupSchema

### Validation Rules
| Field | Type | Requirement |
|---|---|---|
| firstName | string | Required |
| lastName | string | Required |
| email | string | Required |
| phoneNumber | string | Required |
| profilePhoto | string | Optional |
| password | string | Required |
| contact | alternatives | Optional |
| contact.countryCode | string | Optional |
| contact.phoneNo | alternatives | Required |

Controller: get_settings

Controller: update_settings
Schema: updateSettingsSchema

### Validation Rules
| Field | Type | Requirement |
|---|---|---|
| address | string | Optional |
| contact | string | Optional |
| email | string | Optional |
| instagram | string | Optional |
| facebook | string | Optional |
| youtube | string | Optional |
| twitter | string | Optional |
| isOutOfStockProductShow | boolean | Optional |
| freeDeliveryAbove | number | Optional |
| isCODAvailable | boolean | Optional |
| isRazorpay | boolean | Optional |
| isPhonePe | boolean | Optional |
| isShipRocket | boolean | Optional |
| isCashFree | boolean | Optional |
| securePaymentImages | array | Optional |
| securePaymentTitle | string | Optional |

body.raw:
{
  "address": "sample_address",
  "contact": "sample_contact",
  "email": "test@example.com",
  "instagram": "sample_instagram",
  "facebook": "sample_facebook",
  "youtube": "sample_youtube",
  "twitter": "sample_twitter",
  "isOutOfStockProductShow": true,
  "freeDeliveryAbove": 123,
  "isCODAvailable": true,
  "isRazorpay": true,
  "isPhonePe": true,
  "isShipRocket": true,
  "isCashFree": true,
  "securePaymentImages": [
    "sample_string"
  ],
  "securePaymentTitle": "sample_securePaymentTitle"
}
